home.description: A Go + Next.js full-stack scaffold focused on conventions, end-to-end type safety, and fast project startup. Built with Gin + GORM + Wire on the backend and Next.js + TypeScript + shadcn/ui on the frontend.
home.featureOneDesc: Run make dev to launch the full-stack development environment
home.featureTwoDesc: Go → OpenAPI → TypeScript coverage across the whole stack
home.featureThreeDesc: A strong convention-driven structure that AI can understand reliably

auth.loginDesc: Enter your credentials to access the system
auth.registerDesc: Create a new account to get started
auth.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.passwordMax: Password must be 100 characters or fewer
auth.usernameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
auth.usernameMax: Username must be 50 characters or fewer

dashboard.overview: This is your project dashboard overview
dashboard.itemsHint: Fetch real data from the API
dashboard.quickStartLineOne: 🚀 This is the sample dashboard page for the GoNext Template scaffold.
dashboard.quickStartLineTwo: 📦 Visit “Items” to explore the CRUD example.
dashboard.quickStartLineThree: 📤 Visit “File upload” to try the upload flow.
dashboard.quickStartLineFour: 🔧 Edit frontend/app/dashboard/page.tsx to customize this page.

upload.title: File upload
upload.dropzoneTitle: Click or drag a file here to upload
upload.dropzoneHint: Supports JPG, PNG, GIF, PDF, and DOC files up to 10MB
